zh.Biscay, Basque Country, Spain: 西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mayor Diaz於1125年出生在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞時，她的父親Diego Sánchez86歲，母親Enderquina Álvarez66歲。她和Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世在她的家鄉，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安帕倫希亞比拉萊斯。

zh-hans.Biscay, Basque Country, Spain: 西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mayor Diaz于1125年出生在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞时，她的父亲Diego Sánchez86岁，母亲Enderquina Álvarez66岁。她和Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世在她的家乡，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安帕倫希亞比拉萊斯。

nameMeanings.name: Diaz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jesus, Francisco, Jorge, Rafael, Miguel, Pedro, Roberto.
Spanish (Díaz): patronymic from the medieval personal name Didacus (see Diego ).

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Spanish surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Diazdeleon
meanings: Spanish: combination of the surname Díaz (see Diaz ) and the name León (see Leon ) with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Diego
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Francisco, Juan, Fernando, Jose, Miguel, Mario, Maximo, Salvador, Aida, Ana, Domingo.

Spanish: from the very common male personal name Diego, which in the Spanish-speaking world is usually taken to be a shortened form of Santiago . However, this may be only a folk etymology. The personal name is found in the Middle Ages in the Latin forms Didacus and Didagus, probably a derivative of Greek didachē ‘doctrine, teaching’. However, in view of the fact that this personal name is unknown outside the Iberian Peninsula, it may actually have a pre-Roman origin.

variants.name: Diez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Juan, Fernando, Pedro, Rafael, Roberto, Angel, Eduardo, Mario, Ricardo.

nameMeanings.name: Mayor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Pedro, Agapito, Alberto, Cesar, Cosme, Javier, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Manuel, Orlando.
Spanish: nickname for an older man or a distinguishing epithet for the elder of two bearers of the same personal name, from mayor ‘older’, from Latin maior (natus), literally ‘greater (by birth)’.

variants.name: Morgado
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Abilio, Acacio, Armando, Mario, Edmundo, Eduardo, Miguel, Adolfo, Alejandra.  Portuguese Henrique.
Portuguese and Spanish: distinguishing name for the eldest son of a family, from Portuguese morgado ‘first-born, heir’, Late Latin maioricatus, a derivative of maior (see Mayor 2).

variants.name: Mayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Franz, Helmut, Wilhelm, Erwin, Gerhard, Heinz, Ilse, Lorenz, Wolfgang.

English (Staffordshire): post-medieval form of Mear, which is either a topographic name, from Middle English mere ‘pond, pool’ (Old English mere) or Middle English mere ‘boundary’ (Old English (ge)mǣre), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places with names derived from these terms, such as Mere (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Wiltshire), Meir in Caverswall (Staffordshire), and Meare (Somerset).
English: occupational name for a physician, from Old French mire, Middle English mire, meir, meyre, originally synonymous with Myer .

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Mayor Diaz was born in 1125, in Biscay, Basque Country, Spain, her father, Diego Sánchez, was 86 and her mother, Enderquina Álvarez, was 66. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán. She died in her hometown, and was buried in Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Spain.

fr.Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Espa: Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Espagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mayor Diaz est née en 1125, à Biscaye, Euskadi, Espagne, son père, Diego Sánchez, avait 86 ans et sa mère, Enderquina Álvarez, avait 66 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Espagne.

de.Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Espa: Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Mayor Diaz 1125 in Vizcaya, Euskadi, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Diego Sánchez 86 und ihre Mutter Enderquina Álvarez 66. Sie hatte mit Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Spanien begraben.

it.Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Espa: Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Spagna
it.lifeSummary: Quando Mayor Diaz è nata il nel 1125 nel Vizcaya, Euskadi, Spagna, sua padre, Diego Sánchez, aveva 86 anni e sua madre, Enderquina Álvarez, aveva 66 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Spagna.

スペインエウスカジーヴィズケヤ

ja.Biscay, Basque Country, Spain: スペインエウスカジーヴィズケヤ
ja.lifeSummary: Mayor Diazが1125年にスペインエウスカジーヴィズケヤで生まれた時，父Diego Sánchezは86歳，母Enderquina Álvarezは66歳であった。彼女はDon Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmánとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去し，スペインカスティラ イ レoンプアレンシアペラレスにて埋葬された。

ko.Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Espa: 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 파렌샤 페라일스
ko.lifeSummary: Mayor Diaz(이)가 1125년 스페인 우스카디 비즈카야에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Diego Sánchez(은)는 86세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Enderquina Álvarez(은)는 66세였다. 그녀는 Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 파렌샤 페라일스에 묻혔다.

pt.Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Espa: Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mayor Diaz nasceu em 1125, em Biscaia, Euskadi, Espanha, seu pai, Diego Sánchez, tinha 86 anos e sua mãe, Enderquina Álvarez, tinha 66 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Espanha.

ro.Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Espa: Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Spania

ru.Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Espa: пиреилесь, пеиленся, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mayor Diaz родилась в 1125 г. в местности визкеия, эускади, Испания, её отцу по имени Diego Sánchez было 86 лет, а матери, которую звали Enderquina Álvarez, 66. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán. Она умерла в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности пиреилесь, пеиленся, кастилла и леoн, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mayor Diaz nació en 1125, en Vizcaya, País Vasco, España, su papá, Diego Sánchez, tenía 86 años y su mamá, Enderquina Álvarez, tenía 66 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, España.
